title: Craftennyx's FriendMod
description: Never hit your teammates in PVP again
body:
# Never hit your teammates in PVP again!

You can now set players as your friends, so you can hit them only when your friend protection is turned off.

## Commands:

- /friend add <player> - adds a player to your friend list
- /friend remove <player> removes a player from your friend list
- /friend on - turns on the friend protection, so you can't hit your friends
- /friend off - turns off the friend protection, so you can hit your friends
- /friend list - outputs every player in your friendlist

**There is also a keybind for toggling the friend protection (default F9)**
